name: Roquefort & Cream Cheese Chicken Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the Roquefort cheese and cream cheese until well combined.
2. Add sour cream, cayenne, salt, and tabasco to the mixture. Stir until thoroughly blended.
3. Fold in the finely chopped cooked chicken.
4. Serve on crackers. Makes 1 cup.
